title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Surat operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises:
Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patni Computer Systems International Enterprises!
